name: City Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, pork, and bread crumbs with milk, 1 egg (lightly beaten), and seasonings.
2. Wash hands well in soapy water.
3. Shape into 36 one-inch balls and thread onto each of the 12 skewers.
4. Chill if needed to firm up the meat.
5. Whisk together 1 egg and 1 tablespoon water.
6. Dip each skewer in the egg mixture, then coat with cornflake crumbs.
7. Heat 3 tablespoons peanut oil in a medium skillet.
8. Fry the city chicken until golden brown, turning often for even browning.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Transfer to a lightly greased baking pan and drizzle with canned chicken gravy (season as desired).
11. Cover with aluminum foil and bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
12. Remove foil and continue cooking for an additional 15 minutes.
